# Plan: Production-Ready Offline-First Botanical Field Book App (Complete)

Build a comprehensive Flutter app for offline botanical data collection with detailed plant registration, unlimited multi-photo capture with EXIF preservation, enhanced photo viewer, audio field notes with transcription, draft management, CSV/JSON import/export, collaborative collection sessions with QR sharing and multi-device sync, advanced full-text and GPS radius search with saved queries, statistics dashboard, cloud auto-backup (Google Drive/Dropbox), backup/restore, multi-language support (English/Portuguese/Spanish), centralized error handling with offline queue, comprehensive testing suite, and onboarding tutorial. Use Isar with FTS indexes for offline-first database with performance optimization, Riverpod for state management, flutter_map with multiple tile providers, eventual consistency for collaborative features, and manual merge UI for sync conflicts.

## Steps

### 1. Initialize project dependencies, folder structure, and configuration

Update [pubspec.yaml](pubspec.yaml) with: isar (^3.1.0) + isar_flutter_libs + isar_generator, flutter_riverpod (^2.4.0), image_picker (^1.0.0), flutter_image_compress (^2.1.0), exif (^3.3.0), geolocator (^11.0.0), permission_handler (^11.0.0), flutter_map (^6.1.0) + flutter_map_tile_caching (^9.0.0) + latlong2 (^0.9.0), csv (^6.0.0), path_provider (^2.1.0), uuid (^4.0.0), share_plus (^7.2.0), intl (^0.19.0), fl_chart (^0.66.0), archive (^3.4.0), shared_preferences (^2.2.0), photo_view (^0.14.0), file_picker (^6.1.0), cached_network_image (^3.3.0), infinite_scroll_pagination (^4.0.0), flutter_localizations (SDK), introduction_screen (^3.1.0), logger (^2.0.0), record (^5.0.0), audioplayers (^5.2.0), speech_to_text (^6.6.0), qr_flutter (^4.1.0), mobile_scanner (^4.0.0), connectivity_plus (^5.0.0), googleapis (^12.0.0), googleapis_auth (^1.4.0), extension_google_sign_in_as_googleapis_auth (^2.0.0); add build_runner + mocktail + integration_test to dev_dependencies; create folder structure in [lib/](lib/): core/database/, core/repositories/, core/services/, core/errors/, core/sync/, models/, features/home/, features/plant_form/, features/plant_detail/, features/photo_viewer/, features/audio_notes/, features/export/, features/import/, features/map_manager/, features/settings/, features/statistics/, features/backup/, features/cloud_backup/, features/sessions/, features/session_sharing/, features/advanced_search/, features/sync/, features/onboarding/, shared/widgets/, shared/utils/, shared/constants/, l10n/; setup l10n.yaml for ARB file generation with supportedLocales en/pt/es

### 2. Setup localization infrastructure with complete translations

Create ARB files in [lib/l10n/](lib/l10n/): app_en.arb (English baseline), app_pt.arb (Portuguese), app_es.arb (Spanish) with keys for: UI strings (buttons, labels, titles, messages, navigation), botanical terms (category names: Trees/Shrubs/Herbs/Ferns/Grasses/Vines/Cacti/Aquatic, field labels), measurement units, error messages, onboarding content, settings labels, statistics labels, audio recording prompts, cloud backup status messages, sharing instructions, search operators; configure MaterialApp with localizationsDelegates: GlobalMaterialLocalizations/GlobalWidgetsLocalizations/GlobalCupertinoLocalizations + AppLocalizations.delegate, supportedLocales [Locale('en'), Locale('pt'), Locale('es')], use intl package for date/time/number formatting with locale awareness; create locale selector in settings screen with language DropdownButton showing flag icons, persist to shared_preferences, apply with AppLocalizations.of(context) throughout app

### 3. Setup Isar database with FTS indexes and all models

Create models in [models/](lib/models/): PlantRecord @collection (id UUID @Id, scientificName @Index String, commonName @Index String, scientificNameFts String for full-text search, commonNameFts String for FTS, family/genus/species String, habitat String, dateCollected @Index DateTime, latitude/longitude doubles, category @Index enum, measurements embedded List<Measurement> with label/value/unit, photoPaths List<String>, photoMetadata embedded List<PhotoMeta> with exifData/dateTaken/gpsCoordinates/fileSize, audioNotePaths List<String>, audioTranscripts List<String>, notes String, isDraft @Index bool, sessionId @Index UUID IsarLink to CollectionSession, deviceId String for multi-device tracking, contributorName String, createdAt/updatedAt @Index DateTime, syncMetadata embedded with serverId/lastSyncedAt/localModifiedAt/conflictData/syncStatus/lastPushedHash); CollectionSession @collection (id UUID, tripName @Index String, startDate/endDate DateTime, location String, teamMembers List<String>, shareCode String unique for QR sharing, sharedWith List<String> device IDs, notes String, plantCount computed, isArchived bool, createdAt DateTime, syncMetadata similar); SavedSearch @collection (id UUID, name String, query String, filters Map<String,dynamic> with category/draft/dateRange/gpsRadius, createdAt DateTime); Settings @collection (id 1, mapCacheRadius/mapProvider/mapboxToken, autoSaveInterval, photoCompressionQuality, defaultCategory, measurementUnitDefaults, exportFilenameFormat, duplicateHandling, paginationSize, localeCode, cloudBackupProvider enum GoogleDrive/Dropbox/None, cloudBackupEnabled bool, cloudBackupWifiOnly bool, lastCloudBackup DateTime, deviceId UUID, deviceName String); add compound indexes @Index([category, isDraft, dateCollected]), full-text indexes using Isar FTS on scientificNameFts/commonNameFts, spatial indexes preparation for GPS queries; setup [core/database/isar_service.dart](lib/core/database/isar_service.dart) singleton initializing schemas, bulk operations, explain query helpers

### 4. Create repository layer with advanced queries and eventual consistency

Build [core/repositories/plant_repository.dart](lib/core/repositories/plant_repository.dart) with methods: getPaginated with offset/limit, fullTextSearch(query) using Isar .filter().scientificNameFtsMatches(query).or().commonNameFtsMatches(query), searchByGpsRadius(lat, lng, radiusKm) filtering records where haversine distance <= radius, searchByDateRange(start, end), getBySession with conflict resolution for multi-device plants checking deviceId and updatedAt, bulkUpdate/bulkDelete wrapped in writeTxn, create/update with hash generation for change detection using crypto package hashValues on all fields, detectDuplicates for eventual consistency merging duplicates from same session by comparing hashes; implement [core/repositories/saved_search_repository.dart](lib/core/repositories/saved_search_repository.dart) for CRUD on SavedSearch; create [core/repositories/session_repository.dart](lib/core/repositories/session_repository.dart) with generateShareCode() creating 6-character alphanumeric code, getByShareCode for QR joining, addDeviceToSession tracking sharedWith list, syncSessionPlants implementing eventual consistency by fetching all plants from session checking for updates and conflicts; add [core/services/thumbnail_cache_service.dart](lib/core/services/thumbnail_cache_service.dart) with LRU cache and compute isolate compression; wrap all in Riverpod providers with @riverpod auto-dispose

### 5. Implement centralized error handling with offline queue and retry

Create [core/errors/app_error.dart](lib/core/errors/app_error.dart) sealed class hierarchy: DatabaseError/NetworkError/FileSystemError/ValidationError/PermissionError/SyncError/CloudBackupError/AudioRecordingError subtypes with message/stackTrace/context; build [core/services/error_logger_service.dart](lib/core/services/error_logger_service.dart) using logger package with file rotation in applicationDocumentsDirectory/logs, console output debug mode only; create [core/services/error_handler_service.dart](lib/core/services/error_handler_service.dart) with handleError categorizing errors and showing localized SnackBar messages, logError persisting to file; implement [core/services/offline_error_queue.dart](lib/core/services/offline_error_queue.dart) using Isar ErrorQueueItem collection with retry queue, exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s max), connectivity_plus listener processing queue when online, separate queues for sync/backup/cloud operations; add FlutterError.onError and PlatformDispatcher.instance.onError global handlers

### 6. Build cloud backup service with Google Drive and Dropbox integration

Create [features/cloud_backup/services/cloud_backup_service.dart](lib/features/cloud_backup/services/cloud_backup_service.dart) with abstract CloudProvider interface (authenticate, uploadBackup, listBackups, downloadBackup, deleteBackup); implement GoogleDriveProvider using googleapis package with OAuth2 flow via extension_google_sign_in_as_googleapis_auth, authenticate returning credentials stored in secure_storage, uploadBackup creating ZIP identical to local backup and uploading to Drive "Field Book Backups" folder using DriveApi files.create with media, listBackups querying folder for ZIP files, downloadBackup by fileId; implement DropboxProvider using http package and Dropbox API v2 with OAuth2 flow, endpoints /files/upload and /files/list_folder; create [features/cloud_backup/services/auto_cloud_backup_service.dart](lib/features/cloud_backup/services/auto_cloud_backup_service.dart) with connectivity_plus listener checking settings.cloudBackupWifiOnly and ConnectivityResult.wifi, Timer.periodic checking settings.lastCloudBackup + 24h elapsed, trigger backup calling backup_service.createBackup then cloudProvider.uploadBackup with progress callback, update settings.lastCloudBackup, handle errors with offline queue for retry; add UI in [features/cloud_backup/screens/cloud_backup_screen.dart](lib/features/cloud_backup/screens/cloud_backup_screen.dart) showing provider selector RadioListTile, sign-in button with OAuth flow, backup status (last upload timestamp, storage used), backup list from cloud with download/delete actions, manual backup now button

### 7. Implement collaborative session sharing with QR codes

Create [features/session_sharing/services/session_sharing_service.dart](lib/features/session_sharing/services/session_sharing_service.dart) with methods: generateQRCode(sessionId) calling sessionRepository.generateShareCode returning 6-char code and creating QR data JSON {sessionId: uuid, shareCode: code, sessionName: name, deviceId: settings.deviceId}, renderQRCodeImage using qr_flutter QrImageView widget captured with RepaintBoundary.toImage; joinSessionFromQR(qrData) parsing JSON, calling sessionRepository.getByShareCode validating code exists, adding current deviceId to session.sharedWith list, showing confirmation dialog with session details; implement [features/session_sharing/screens/share_session_screen.dart](lib/features/session_sharing/screens/share_session_screen.dart) displaying large QR code, share code text with copy button, session info (name, dates, creator), instructions for joining, share button exporting QR as image via share_plus; create [features/session_sharing/screens/join_session_screen.dart](lib/features/session_sharing/screens/join_session_screen.dart) with mobile_scanner MobileScannerController scanning QR codes, onDetect callback parsing data and calling joinSessionFromQR, manual code entry TextField with submit, showing joined session summary and navigating to session detail; add eventual consistency sync in [core/sync/session_sync_service.dart](lib/core/sync/session_sync_service.dart): when session is shared, each device periodically (every 60s) fetches all plants with matching sessionId from local DB, generates list of hashes, compares with last known state, detects new/updated plants, implements CRDT-like Last-Write-Wins strategy comparing updatedAt timestamps, resolves conflicts by keeping newer version, merges contributor names, shows sync status in session detail

### 8. Build advanced search with full-text, GPS radius, and saved queries

Create [features/advanced_search/screens/advanced_search_screen.dart](lib/features/advanced_search/screens/advanced_search_screen.dart) with ExpansionPanels for search criteria: text search TextField using Isar FTS on scientificNameFts/commonNameFts with query syntax tips (AND/OR/NOT operators), category multi-select with CheckboxListTile for each enum, date range with start/end DatePickers, GPS radius search with location TextField or "Use Current Location" button fetching GPS, radius Slider 0.1km-50km, draft status toggle, session filter dropdown; implement [core/repositories/plant_repository.dart](lib/core/repositories/plant_repository.dart) advancedSearch method combining all filters with Isar query builder .filter() chaining conditions, for GPS radius calculate haversine distance in dart: `asin(sqrt(sin²(Δlat/2) + cos(lat1)*cos(lat2)*sin²(Δlon/2))) * 2R` filtering where distance <= radius; add saved search functionality: save query button opening dialog for name input, create SavedSearch record with serialized filters Map, display saved searches ListView in search screen with edit/delete/execute actions, execute loading filters and running search; show search results in ListView identical to home screen with pagination, export results button, save as session option

### 9. Implement audio field notes with recording and transcription

Create [features/audio_notes/services/audio_recording_service.dart](lib/features/audio_notes/services/audio_recording_service.dart) using record package with methods: startRecording requesting microphone permission via permission_handler, recording to applicationDocumentsDirectory/audio with UUID filename .m4a format, stopRecording returning file path, pauseRecording/resumeRecording for long notes; implement [features/audio_notes/services/audio_transcription_service.dart](lib/features/audio_notes/services/audio_transcription_service.dart) using speech_to_text package with transcribe method: initialize SpeechToText checking available, listen with onResult callback appending recognized words to transcript String, support multiple locales from settings for transcription language, handle errors with offline queue when speech recognition unavailable; create [features/audio_notes/widgets/audio_recorder_widget.dart](lib/features/audio_notes/widgets/audio_recorder_widget.dart) showing: microphone IconButton toggling recording state with animation, recording timer displaying MM:SS, waveform visualizer using Stream<RecordingDisposition> for amplitude, pause/resume buttons when recording, done button stopping and saving, transcription toggle SwitchListTile enabling live transcription, transcript text display with edit TextField for corrections; integrate into plant form as 6th tab "Audio Notes" with ListView of recorded notes showing: audioplayers AudioPlayer widget for playback with play/pause/seek controls, transcript text if available, edit transcript IconButton, delete IconButton, duration Text, recorded timestamp; save audio paths to PlantRecord.audioNotePaths list and transcripts to audioTranscripts list, include in detail screen and export data

### 10. Build settings screen with all configuration options

Create [features/settings/screens/settings_screen.dart](lib/features/settings/screens/settings_screen.dart) ListView with sections: Language (locale DropdownButton with flags), Map (provider RadioListTile OSM/Mapbox Streets/Satellite, token TextField, cache radius, cache size, clear button, auto-cache toggle), Form (auto-save Slider 15s/30s/60s/off, default category), Photo (compression Slider 30%/50%/70%, preserve EXIF toggle), Audio (transcription enabled toggle, transcription language dropdown matching app locales, audio quality selector Low/Medium/High), Measurement (default units DataTable editor), Export (filename format TextField with variables and preview), Import (duplicate handling RadioListTile), Cloud Backup (provider selector Google Drive/Dropbox/None, sign-in status, enable toggle, Wi-Fi only toggle, auto-backup schedule), Collaboration (device name TextField for contributor attribution, share analytics toggle showing plants contributed to shared sessions), Search (saved searches management link, search history toggle, max results Slider), Performance (pagination size, thumbnail cache, query logging), Backup (last local backup, auto-backup schedule, backup/restore buttons), About (version, storage paths, record counts, licenses, tutorial replay button); use [core/services/settings_service.dart](lib/core/services/settings_service.dart) Riverpod StateNotifier wrapping Isar Settings with reactive updates

### 11. Create collection session management with sharing capabilities

Build [features/sessions/screens/sessions_list_screen.dart](lib/features/sessions/screens/sessions_list_screen.dart) with TabBarView (Active/Archived tabs), ListView of sessions showing ExpansionTiles: trip name, date range Badge, plant count Chip, location Icon, team members Wrap, shared indicator Icon.people if sharedWith.isNotEmpty, sync status indicator for shared sessions showing last sync time and pending changes count; create [features/sessions/screens/session_detail_screen.dart](lib/features/sessions/screens/session_detail_screen.dart) CustomScrollView: SliverAppBar with trip name and actions (edit/archive/share/export), session info Card (location, dates, team members, creator device, notes), sharing Card showing QR code button, share code with copy, joined devices list with contributor names and plant counts, sync status with last sync timestamp and sync now button, statistics Cards (total plants, photos, audio notes, species count, most common category), map with all collection points using MarkerClusterLayerWidget, plants ListView filtered by sessionId with infinite scroll showing contributor badges; implement [features/sessions/screens/session_form_screen.dart](lib/features/sessions/screens/session_form_screen.dart) with trip name required, date range pickers, location TextField with map picker option, team members ChipsInput, notes multiline; add share session action navigating to ShareSessionScreen, join session FAB in sessions list opening JoinSessionScreen with scanner

### 12. Build comprehensive plant registration form with all features

Create [features/plant_form/screens/plant_form_screen.dart](lib/features/plant_form/screens/plant_form_screen.dart) TabBarView with FormKeys: (1) Basic Info (scientific/common name TextFields, family/genus/species, category DropdownButton 8 localized options, session selector DropdownButton with current session default and create new inline), (2) Location (MapWidget with configurable TileLayer, current GPS blue CircleMarker from geolocator, draggable plant red Marker updating coordinates, zoom controls, coordinates Text with copy, location name context TextField), (3) Habitat (habitat TextArea maxLines 5 maxLength 500 with counter), (4) Measurements (ReorderableListView with add button, rows: label Autocomplete suggesting common measurements with localized strings, value TextField numeric, unit Dropdown from settings defaults, delete IconButton), (5) Photos (ReorderableWrap GridView with camera FAB, compress with settings quality preserving EXIF, thumbnails with delete, photo counter, tap to preview), (6) Audio Notes (AudioRecorderWidget with record button, live transcription toggle, recorded notes ListView with playback controls and transcripts, edit/delete actions); implement auto-save Timer.periodic from settings.autoSaveInterval calling repository.update setting isDraft true, show saving SnackBar, bottom AppBar buttons "Save as Draft" / "Mark Complete" with validation on complete checking required fields (scientificName, category, coordinates); pre-fill form for edit mode loading PlantRecord by ID

### 13. Implement offline maps with multiple providers and auto-caching

Setup [features/map_manager/services/map_service.dart](lib/features/map_manager/services/map_service.dart) getTileProvider factory returning NetworkTileProvider based on settings.mapProvider: OSM "https://tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png", Mapbox Streets/Satellite with access_token parameter; configure flutter_map_tile_caching FMTCStore per provider with backgroundDownload enabled; create [features/map_manager/services/auto_cache_service.dart](lib/features/map_manager/services/auto_cache_service.dart) background service using geolocator positionStream, when position changes > 500m calculate LatLngBounds from center with radius from settings, download tiles zoom 10-16 using FMTCStore.download showing notification with progress; build [features/map_manager/screens/cache_management_screen.dart](lib/features/map_manager/screens/cache_management_screen.dart) ListView per provider with cached regions cards showing mini-map preview, size Text, delete button, manual download section with map region selector CircleRegion/RectangleRegion drawing, download button with progress; create reusable [shared/widgets/map_widget.dart](lib/shared/widgets/map_widget.dart) FlutterMap with TileLayer, MarkerLayer, currentLocation marker, zoom controls, attribution

### 14. Build home screen with statistics, search, filtering, and bulk actions

Create [features/home/screens/home_screen.dart](lib/home/screens/home_screen.dart) Scaffold with BottomNavigationBar (Plants/Sessions/Statistics/Settings tabs); Plants tab CustomScrollView: SliverAppBar pinned with search TextField debounced 300ms calling setState, actions (advanced search IconButton, filter IconButton), SliverPersistentHeader with statistics summary Card (total plants AnimatedCounter, photos, audio notes, storage LinearProgressIndicator, category BarChart horizontal), SliverToBoxAdapter filter Wrap (category FilterChips with All + 8 options showing counts, draft/complete ToggleButtons, sort Dropdown), SliverList with infinite_scroll_pagination PagingController calling repository.getPaginated, itemBuilder returning Dismissible with PlantCard: cached thumbnail, scientific name bold, common name italic, category Badge, draft Icon, audio Icon.mic if audioNotePaths.isNotEmpty, session Chip, contributor Text if from shared session, date formatted, long-press enabling selection mode with Checkboxes and HapticFeedback; FAB for new plant; when selected show ModalBottomSheet with bulk actions (delete confirm dialog, export format selector, mark complete, change category, assign to session); pull-to-refresh; advanced search button navigating to AdvancedSearchScreen

### 15. Create enhanced photo viewer with zoom, EXIF, and reordering

Build [features/photo_viewer/screens/photo_viewer_screen.dart](lib/features/photo_viewer/screens/photo_viewer_screen.dart) PageView.builder with PhotoView items: pinch zoom, double-tap toggle, pan gestures, backgroundDecoration black; overlay Stack with top AppBar (back, counter "{currentIndex+1}/{total}", reorder toggle, delete with confirm, share), bottom AnimatedContainer EXIF panel toggled by tap showing: dateTaken from photoMetadata formatted, GPS coordinates with "View on Map" button, camera model from exifData["Model"], file size formatted KB/MB, resolution WxH, exposure ISO/aperture/shutter from EXIF tags; reorder mode showing horizontal ReorderableListView thumbnail strip at bottom with drag handles, onReorder updating PlantRecord.photoPaths saving to repository; Hero animations with tag "plant_photo_{plantId}_{index}" matching list/detail thumbnails

### 16. Build statistics dashboard with comprehensive visualizations

Create [features/statistics/screens/statistics_screen.dart](lib/features/statistics/screens/statistics_screen.dart) RefreshIndicator wrapping ListView with Cards: date range selector SegmentedButton (All/Year/Month/Custom DateRangePicker), summary Row (total plants Counter with trend icon, drafts, complete, photos, audio notes, storage), category PieChart with percentages and interactive legend filtering on tap, collection timeline BarChart months/weeks with plant count, draft vs complete DonutChart, storage breakdown stacked ProgressIndicator (photos/database/cache/audio segments), averages Cards (photos per plant, audio notes per plant, plants per session), top Cards (most photographed plant with thumbnail link, most productive session, collection rate plants/day), collection heatmap flutter_map with all locations and MarkerClusterLayerWidget clustering zoom < 12; export statistics FAB generating PDF with pdf package capturing charts as images using RepaintBoundary and toImage, share via share_plus

### 17. Implement comprehensive backup and restore with versioning

Create [features/backup/services/backup_service.dart](lib/features/backup/services/backup_service.dart) createBackup method: progress dialog, copy Isar database file, copy photos directory, copy audio directory, create manifest.json {version: "2.0", createdAt, appVersion from package_info, totalPlants/sessions/photos/audioNotes counts, locale, deviceId, deviceName}, compress with ZipEncoder to temp/fieldbook_backup_{timestamp}.zip with progress callback, save to downloads or share with share_plus, update settings.lastBackupDate; restoreBackup: file_picker select ZIP, extract with ZipDecoder, validate manifest version checking compatibility (reject if version > current), preview dialog showing backup contents (plants count, date range, sessions list, storage size, source device), confirmation with overwrite warning, close Isar, replace database/photos/audio if overwrite, import settings, reinitialize Isar, invalidate providers, success dialog with import summary; add UI in settings and home drawer

### 18. Create data import with mapping, validation, and preview

Build [features/import/services/import_service.dart](lib/features/import/services/import_service.dart) importCSV: file_picker select CSV, parse with csv package, show [features/import/screens/column_mapping_screen.dart](lib/features/import/screens/column_mapping_screen.dart) DataTable with first 5 rows and DropdownButton headers mapping to PlantRecord fields, validate required mappings, parse photo/audio paths by delimiter; importJSON: parse with jsonDecode, validate schema structure; create [features/import/screens/import_preview_screen.dart](lib/features/import/screens/import_preview_screen.dart) PaginatedDataTable showing parsed records with duplicate warning Icons, status column, handle duplicates per settings (Skip/Overwrite/Rename); batch import with progress dialog, try-catch per record collecting errors, generate [features/import/screens/import_summary_screen.dart](lib/features/import/screens/import_summary_screen.dart) with imported/skipped/failed counts, errors ListView with export errors CSV; add import action in home app bar menu

### 19. Build comprehensive plant detail screen with all features

Create [features/plant_detail/screens/plant_detail_screen.dart](lib/features/plant_detail/screens/plant_detail_screen.dart) CustomScrollView: SliverAppBar.large expandedHeight 300 with photo PageView carousel and Hero animations, pinned, title scientificName, actions (edit/delete/share/duplicate); SliverList Cards: Basic Info (ListTiles: names with copy, category Badge, session Chip tappable, draft indicator, contributor name if from shared session with device badge), Taxonomy DataTable (family/genus/species), Location (mini MapWidget with marker, coordinates with copy, location name, navigate button launching platform maps), Measurements DataTable (label/value/unit), Habitat (notes Text wrapped), Audio Notes (ListView with AudioPlayer playback controls, transcript text with expand, duration, timestamp, edit/delete if owned), Photos (GridView thumbnails with count, tap opening viewer with Hero, reorder button), Metadata (Chips: collection date, created/updated relative timestamps, counts, storage, sync status, contributor); FloatingActionButton edit, speed dial secondary actions

### 20. Implement export functionality with multiple formats and templates

Create [features/export/services/export_service.dart](lib/features/export/services/export_service.dart) exportToCSV method: headers [id, scientificName, commonName, family, genus, species, habitat, category, latitude, longitude, dateCollected, measurements, photoPaths, audioNotePaths, audioTranscripts, notes, isDraft, sessionId, contributorName, createdAt, updatedAt], format measurements as JSON string, photos/audio as pipe-separated paths, use ListToCsvConverter, apply filename format replacing variables; exportToJSON: nested structure {metadata: {exportedAt, count, version, exportedBy: deviceName}, plants: [...], sessions: [if included]}, include photoMetadata with EXIF arrays, audio transcripts; exportToPDF using pdf package: title page with logo, Table of Contents, for each plant Page with header scientificName, details table, photo grid embedded compressed images, audio transcription sections, location map snapshot pre-rendered, measurements table, footer page numbers; add share methods with share_plus file attachment; batch export from home selected records, single from detail, format selector dialog RadioListTile

### 21. Prepare sync infrastructure with conflict resolution UI

Extend [core/repositories/plant_repository.dart](lib/core/repositories/plant_repository.dart) with sync methods: getAllPendingSync filtering syncStatus pending, markForSync updating status and timestamp, fetchFromServer placeholder GET /api/plants with pagination, pushToServer placeholder POST with JSON + auth bearer token from settings, detectConflicts comparing updatedAt returning List<FieldConflict>; create [models/sync_models.dart](lib/models/sync_models.dart) with SyncStatus enum, ConflictResolution embedded class, FieldConflict (fieldName, localValue, serverValue, timestamps, selectedSource local/server/custom, customValue); build [features/sync/screens/sync_dashboard_screen.dart](lib/features/sync/screens/sync_dashboard_screen.dart) showing pending sync Card count, last sync timestamp, sync now button checking connectivity, sync queue ListView with plant cards and status badges; create [features/sync/screens/conflict_resolution_screen.dart](lib/features/sync/screens/conflict_resolution_screen.dart) with conflicted plants ListView in ExpansionTiles, field-level comparison ConflictFieldCards with RadioListTile groups local/server/custom with TextField, preview section showing merged result, bottom AppBar with auto-resolve dropdown prefer local/server, accept button saving resolution and retrying push

### 22. Create app onboarding with tutorial and samples

Build [features/onboarding/screens/onboarding_screen.dart](lib/features/onboarding/screens/onboarding_screen.dart) using introduction_screen IntroductionScreen with PageViewModels: (1) Welcome page with logo and offline-first explanation, (2) Permissions page explaining camera/location/microphone/storage needs with grant button calling permission_handler and status chips with retry, (3) Features tour with screenshots/animations: registration form, offline maps, photo/audio capture, draft management, collaborative sessions with QR, cloud backup, export, (4) Sample data page with "Load Sample Plants" button creating 10 example PlantRecords with different categories and sample photos/audio from assets, explanation text, (5) Tips page: download map tiles before trips, enable auto-save and cloud backup, use sessions to organize, share with team via QR, regular backups; onDone navigating to home and setting settings.hasCompletedOnboarding true; check flag in main.dart MaterialApp.home ternary; add "Show Tutorial" in settings, "Load Samples" in home empty state

### 23. Setup comprehensive testing infrastructure

Create test structure: test/unit/repositories/, test/unit/services/, test/widget/screens/, test/integration/, test/golden/; unit tests with mocktail: [test/unit/repositories/plant_repository_test.dart](test/unit/repositories/plant_repository_test.dart) mocking Isar testing CRUD/pagination/search/GPS radius/FTS queries/conflict detection, [test/unit/services/thumbnail_cache_service_test.dart](test/unit/services/thumbnail_cache_service_test.dart) cache operations, [test/unit/services/audio_recording_service_test.dart](test/unit/services/audio_recording_service_test.dart) recording lifecycle, [test/unit/services/session_sharing_service_test.dart](test/unit/services/session_sharing_service_test.dart) QR generation/joining, [test/unit/services/cloud_backup_service_test.dart](test/unit/services/cloud_backup_service_test.dart) upload/download mocked; widget tests: [test/widget/screens/plant_form_screen_test.dart](test/widget/screens/plant_form_screen_test.dart) form validation/tabs/auto-save/photo picker/audio recorder, [test/widget/screens/advanced_search_screen_test.dart](test/widget/screens/advanced_search_screen_test.dart) filter interactions; integration tests: [test/integration/create_plant_flow_test.dart](test/integration/create_plant_flow_test.dart) full flow launch→form→photo→audio→save→list→detail→export, [test/integration/session_sharing_test.dart](test/integration/session_sharing_test.dart) create session→generate QR→join→contribute plant→sync; golden tests: [test/golden/home_screen_test.dart](test/golden/home_screen_test.dart) screenshots in different states light/dark themes comparing with references; coverage script generating HTML report

### 24. Implement main app with initialization and error boundaries

Update [lib/main.dart](lib/main.dart) main() async with try-catch: WidgetsFlutterBinding.ensureInitialized(), initialize path_provider, initialize Isar with all schemas, initialize settings service loading or creating defaults including generating deviceId UUID and deviceName, setup error handling FlutterError.onError and PlatformDispatcher.instance.onError calling error logger, initialize Riverpod ProviderContainer, runApp in ProviderScope; create MyApp returning MaterialApp with: localizationsDelegates [AppLocalizations.delegate, GlobalMaterialLocalizations.delegate, GlobalWidgetsLocalizations.delegate, GlobalCupertinoLocalizations.delegate], supportedLocales [Locale('en'), Locale('pt'), Locale('es')], locale from settings.localeCode provider reactive, theme/darkTheme with custom ColorScheme and typography, home checking settings.hasCompletedOnboarding ternary OnboardingScreen : HomeScreen, builder wrapping in error boundary widget showing friendly error screen, debugShowCheckedModeBanner false; add WidgetsBindingObserver monitoring didChangeAppLifecycleState pausing auto-save when inactive, triggering cloud backup check when resumed if settings.cloudBackupEnabled and elapsed since lastCloudBackup

## Further Considerations

### 1. Offline-first sync protocol

Implement custom sync protocol with delta encoding sending only changed fields to reduce bandwidth, compression with gzip, batch sync requests

### 2. Advanced permissions

Add role-based access for shared sessions (viewer/contributor/admin), session ownership transfer, private plants visible only to creator

### 3. Data migration

Build versioned migration system for Isar schema changes, data transformations when upgrading app versions, rollback support

### 4. Performance profiling

Add Firebase Performance Monitoring or custom performance tracking for critical operations (form save, image compression, search queries), identify bottlenecks

### 5. Notification system

Push notifications for shared session updates when teammate adds plants, sync completion alerts, backup reminders, storage warnings
